message:
test(providers): add unit tests for context providers (brenner_bot-hd7m)

Add comprehensive tests for QueryProvider and ExcerptBasket context:
- QueryProvider: 11 tests for SSR-safe client, configuration defaults
- ExcerptBasketContext: 24 tests for state, localStorage, hook, trigger
- ExcerptBasket: 31 tests for UI, reordering, clipboard, export

Total: 66 new tests, all passing. Full suite: 3094 tests pass.

This closes brenner_bot-hd7m and unblocks the Testing Infrastructure
Epic (brenner_bot-j90h) which in turn unblocks 6 downstream items.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
